steps.title: Locate x = 2 on the line of best fit
steps.content: Find $x = 2$ on the horizontal axis (the second vertical grid line from the origin). Trace vertically upward to where the line of best fit crosses that vertical line.

steps.title: Read the predicted y-value
steps.content: At $x = 2$, the line of best fit is positioned at $y = 15$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
